headline: “痴迷”领跑今日热搜，龙族前传热度不减
headlineEn: 'Obsession' Tops Trending, Dragon Prequel Stays Hot
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周两部新片。热搜第一为《痴迷》，《权力的游戏前传：龙族》紧随其后。
summaryEn: No new releases today, 2 this week. Top trending 'Obsession', followed by 'House of the Dragon'.

industryHighlights.text: 《福尔摩斯小姐3》本周热搜第四
《穿普拉达的女王2》跻身本周前十
industryHighlights.en: The Devil Wears Prada 2 enters top 10 this week
Upcoming: Avatar: The Last Airbender, Spider-Man: Freshman Year
